title: Run model scout with updated vision filter

log.context: Run model scout with updated vision filter

Done. Here's the full picture:

**What was broken:** The recent refactor of `scout_local.py` accidentally dropped 14 HuggingFace pipeline tags from the exclusion list — including `image-to-text`, `image-classification`, `image-segmentation`, `video-classification`, `zero-shot-image-classification`, and others. It also removed the name-based regex that caught known vision/video/image model families by name.
